messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

I wanted to give you a quick update on the backend migration project.

We're currently at 80% completion and everything is on track for delivery this Friday. The team has been making steady progress, and there are no blockers at this stage.

I'll keep you posted if anything changes. Let me know if you have any questions.

Best regards

- **Subject:** Project Update
- **Body:** Confirmed that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.
- **Status:** Sent ✅ (Message ID: msg-001)
